cards.name: SBM Mobikwik First
cards.badge: FD-backed secured card; no credit history or income proof needed

cards.name: SBM ZET
cards.rewards: Flat 2% cashback with ZET UPI (ZET Plus); up to 20% off on Swiggy, Zomato, Instamart, BookMyShow; flat 5% cashback on Amazon Pay and Flipkart vouchers; up to 15% cashback on 80+ brand vouchers
cards.badge: FD-backed RuPay UPI credit card; build 750+ credit score

cards.name: SBM Kredit.Pe
cards.rewards: 3% cashback on Kredit.Pe UPI; redeemable as 5%/10%/15% off vouchers on popular platforms
cards.badge: FD-backed lifetime-aspiring secured RuPay card; easy approval

cards.name: SBM novio
cards.rewards: novio Coins: 10% on fuel, 5% on UPI, 5% at stores; redeemable for up to 20% off at partner merchants
cards.welcome_benefit: Welcome benefit worth Rs.5,000 (instant discounts up to Rs.23,000 across Amazon, BookMyShow, Zepto, Swiggy)

cards.name: SBM Magnet
cards.rewards: Unlimited magnet coins; up to 10% rewards on purchases from leading brands (EMI and cash transactions excluded)
cards.welcome_benefit: Welcome benefits Rs.21,000+ on card approval (shopping vouchers, travel discounts, OTT subscriptions)
cards.badge: FD-backed secured card by SBM x ZET

cards.name: SBM Niyo Global
cards.rewards: 1 reward point per Rs.100 spent across all purchases
cards.lounge: Complimentary Visa airport lounge access (domestic and international terminals in India)
cards.badge: Zero forex markup FD-backed card for travellers; pay only the Visa exchange rate

cards.name: SBM Paisabazaar Step Up
cards.rewards: 1 point per Rs.100 spent across all categories, redeemable for cash at Rs.0.25 per point (excludes wallet loads, rent, fuel, utilities, insurance, cash advances, EMI)
cards.badge: FD-backed secured credit-builder card (new applications closed)

cards.name: SBM Paisabazaar Paisa +
cards.rewards: Up to 1.5% cashback on online spends (FD above Rs.10,000); 1% cashback on offline spends and UPI transactions above Rs.2,000; credited as Cash Point (1 = Rs.1), capped 500/day and 3,000/month
cards.badge: FD-backed cashback credit-builder card; FD from Rs.2,000
